subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Thou didst make mention of him who is named Ghulám-Ḥusayn - upon him be My glory. Although the condition of this land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود ذکر توجه من سمی بغلام حسین علیه بهائی را نمودی اگرچه حالت این ارض
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
